prompt: Write me an AutoHotkey script that maps Ctrl+Shift+T to type my email address and Ctrl+Shift+D to type the current date in YYYY-MM-DD format

assertions.name: uses-v2-syntax
assertions.text: The script uses AHK v2 syntax (function call style, := assignment, quoted strings) not v1 command syntax

assertions.name: no-v1-syntax
assertions.text: The script does not use any AHK v1 syntax (no MsgBox comma syntax, no bare = assignment, no %Var% in expressions)
